author: y4rr
content:
Pass 5.A.4 closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Source-doc reassessment: all 3 audit-cited skeleton STUBs (gloo/mpi/ucc) + gpu_collective NCCL placeholder are stale-no-op (honest fail-fast feature-gated modules). Real bug: closed-tracker drift — citations to closed #459 and #668 across 4 source files + 6 ignored tests + Cargo.toml + error.rs.

Fix:
- Filed 4 new live tracking issues: #1132 (gloo), #1133 (mpi), #1134 (ucc), #1135 (gpu_collective NCCL wiring)
- Updated all 19 citation sites to cite live IDs (with historical 'replaces closed #459/#668' pointers preserved for traceability)
- Added crate-root lib.rs docstring paragraph explicitly listing the skeleton backends as feature-gated (default off) with live tracker IDs
- Tightened 3 skeleton tests with non-vacuous backend-name string discrimination

Verification: 133/133 lib tests, 1/1 integration tests, build + clippy -D warnings clean. Behavioral surface unchanged.

Subagent caught two architect-side pre-flight issues: (1) 'ZERO matches' grep floor was overly strict given legitimate historical pointers, (2) error.rs was missed in the explicit file list (same closed-tracker-drift pattern; architect-side oversight). Both adaptations were defensible.
